query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: The U.S. Is Awash In Oil And Gasoline. So Why Are Pump Prices So High?
articles.description: There is a mismatch between the kind of oil the U.S. produces and what our refineries can currently handle. It is the root cause of higher gasoline prices here.

articles.title: Contaminated Petrol Explained: How bad fuel can damage your car and ways to stay safe?
articles.description: Contaminated petrol is one of the hidden causes of engine problems and expensive repairs. Water, dirt, rust, or poor-quality fuel can reduce your car's performance, damage the fuel system, and even leave you stranded.

articles.title: AI investors may pivot to hyperscalers from chipmakers, Morgan Stanley says
articles.description: Morgan Stanley has recommended a strategic pivot in market investments, directing attention from semiconductor stocks to AI-based giants such as Alphabet and Amazon. This shift is fueled by expectations of reduced rate hikes and a decline in oil prices, which favor sectors like consumer discretionary, transport, and biotech. As major players invest significantly in AI infrastructure, investors are seeking tangible outcomes, potentially signaling a downturn for chip stocks.

articles.title: Saudi Arabia cuts oil prices for Asia customers by $11 a barrel in biggest reduction in 26 years
articles.description: Saudi Arabia cut the price of its main crude grade for customers in Asia in August by the most in at least 26 years, as a surge of global supply heightens competition for buyers.

articles.title: Oil prices head back to pre-Iran conflict levels: report
articles.description: Oil prices have beginning to decrease down to pre-Iran conflict levels following OPEC+ agreeing to increase production.

articles.description: Oil prices have beginning to decrease down to pre-Iran conflict levels following OPEC+ agreeing to increase production.

articles.title: Nashik: Car Driver Stabs Two-Wheeler Rider After Traffic Dispute In Manmad; Accused Arrested |WATCH VIDEO
articles.description: The victim has been identified as Irfan Beg. He was riding his two-wheeler near the Chopda Petrol Pump in Manmad when a speeding car, heading towards Yeola, cut sharply in front of him. Irfan stopped the car and questioned the driver. Enraged, the car driver pulled out a knife and stabbed Irfan in the abdomen. The accused fled the scene immediately after the attack

articles.title: E20 petrol in pre 2022 cars: Engineer’s blog post against panic goes viral
articles.description: Ashwin Durai, a Chennai-based mechanic, engineer and founder of ICD Tuning, argues that fears around E20 petrol are exaggerated.

articles.title: Markets on Wall Street quietly mixed while oil prices slip
articles.description: US futures mostly climbed following the Independence Day holiday and oil prices slipped after OPEC+ announced a ramp up in production.
